W&ttZK W T <$ ^ r ^ f [m^f. 1/11/2010-#^ V] ftUT ; - ^ ftOT W * ^ T ^ * * 0 * f t 229 (<«),. c f l ^ 1 3T^, 2009 SRI TOlflRT fl*I ^ * 3fa *T.W.ft « « i * 24 (31) cflita 11 *FPI*. 2010 SRI ^ MINISTRY OF CORPORATE AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, Ihe 15th November, 2010 G.S.R.914(E)— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 79 of the Limited Liability Partnership Act, 2008 (6 of 2009), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Limited Liability Partnership Rules, 2009, namely: - 1. (1) These rules may be called the Limited Liability Partnership (Second Amendment) Rules, 2010. (2) They shall come into force on the 6th day of December, 2010. 2. In the Limited Liability Partnership Rules, 2009, in the Annexure, for Form 10, the following Form shall be substituted, namely:- -- 6 of 10 -- [*mrii—7TO3(i)] TOT ^T <|vsfM3| ; 3U«t||<u| 7 Form 10 [See rule 10(9)] Intimation of changes in particulars by Designated Partners Note - All fields marked in * are to be mandatorily filled 1. *Designated Partner Identification Number (DPIN) 2. Name of the Designated Partner; 3. *Please identify and tick the particulars to be changed: • Applicant's Name • Father's / Husband's Name • Nationality • Residentship • Date of birth • Gender • Income-tax permanent account number (PAN) • Voter's identity card number • Passport number n Driving licence number • Residential Address • Other (please specify) Pre-fitl Affix a latest passport size photograph 4. *Please fill the Particulars required to be changed (i). Applicant's name (enter full name and do nc- use abbreviations) (ii) O Father's Q Husband's Name ZZD (iii). Whether resident in India O Yes Q No (iv). Nationality (v). Date of Birth (vi). Gender (vii). Income-tax permanent account number (PAN) (viii). Voter's identity card number (ix). Passport Number (x). Driving licence number (DD/MM/YYYY) HUSZ GX bo-3 -- 7 of 10 -- 8 (xi). Permanent Re *Line 1 *Line2 •City •State •Country •Phone (with STD code) Mobile (xii). Whether prese THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY sidential Address District •Pin Code j*ISO Country Code Fax j •Email Id irit residential address is same as the permanent residential address 1"" 1 1 l [PART H—SEC. 3(i)] 1 I 1 1 . - - _ : -Ji t 1 Oves ONO If no, present residential address •Line 1 •Line 2 1 •City •State •Country •Phone (with STD code) Mobile | District •Pin Code •ISO Country Code | Fax •Email Id 1 i ! 1 ! i I 1 . . . . ^ . • j _J 5. •Proof of identity and Residence Proof of Identity along with photo and signature Tick against the document being attached (furnish any of the following) • Passport • Election (voter identity) card • Driving licence • Income-tax PAN card Proof of residence Tick against the document being attached (furnish any of the following) • Passport • Election (voter identity) card • Ration card • Driving licence • Electricity bill • Telephone bill • Bank account statement n Others-Please specify Attachments* (1) Proof of changes in Identity (2) Proof of changes in residence (3) Photo (4) Optional Attachment List of attachments Attach Attach Attach Attach Remove Attachment -- 8 of 10 -- [*TFTII—*sTO3(i)] TOT ^ T Trsrq^r: s^ron^r 9 , Statement 11 : OSon O Daughter O Wife of resident of hereby declare and verify that the information given in this application and the documents enclosed Is correct and complete. *To be digitally signed by the Designated Partner Date: Place: Modify Check Form Submit General Guidelines for filing Form 1. Attestation/Certification of proof of identity, residence of the applicant 0) The applicant should attach (a) attested or certified copy of the proof of identity containing self-photograph, date of birth and father's/husband's name; (b) attested or certified copy of the proof of residence; (ii) In case of a foreign national, a copy of the valid passport shall be proof of identity. (iii) In case the applicant is nominee of a body corporate, a copy of resolution/authorization on the letterhead of the body corporate mentioning the name and address of an individual nominated to act as designated partner on its behalf shall also be attached. 2. Authorities for attestation/certification (i) (a) Gazetted officer of the Central or State Government (b) Notary Public (c) Company Secretary, Charted Accountant, Cost and Works Accountant holding a certificate of practice under the Company Secretaries Act, 1980, Chartered Accountants Act, 1949/ and the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959. (ii) In the case of foreign nationals residing outside India or foreign body corporate(s) registered outside India, the documents referred in para 2 above, shall be duly ceritifed and the provisions of sub-rule(2) of rule 34 of Limited Liability Partnership rules shall apply mutatis mutandis for this purpose, (copy of sub-rule(2) of rule 34 is available in the instruction kit) 3. Particulars of the attesting/certifying authority The attesting authority must indicate the following while attesting the documents: (i) Name in full in capitals of the attesting authority, (ii) Registration Number and (iii) Name of the ministry/department where the Gazatted officer is employeed, (iv) Seal/Stamp 4. Language of proofs for identity and residence In case the proof of identity and proof of residence is in a language other than Hindi or English, a certified copy of translation of the same in Hindi or English shall be attached. 5. Father's/Husband's Name In case the proof of identify does not indicate the father's/husband's name then additional proof of father's/husband's name, duly certified /attested, should be attached. 6. Proof of residence In case the addresses given in column 3(xi) and (xii) are different, then please attach proof of residence for both the addresses. Further, in case proof of identity attached matches with the addresses given in column 3(xi) and (xii), then separate proof of residence need not be attached. *DPIN -- 9 of 10 -- 10 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA ; EXTRAORDINARY [PARI- II—Sac. 3(i)] For Office use only eForm Service Request Number (SRN): eForm Filing Date: O This e-form is hereby approved O This e-form is hereby rejected Digital Signature of the authorising officer Submit to BO Date of signing: [F. No. 1/11/2010-CL.V] RENUKA KUMAR, Jt.Secy. Note:— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 229 XEf, dated the 1st April, 2009 and was last amended vide number G.S.R 24(E), dated the 11th January, 2010.
